title: INF-5 CAA eval suite (Rimsky 2024 sycophancy reproduction smoke test)
goal: Small eval suite reproducing one CAA case from Rimsky et al. 2024: sycophancy steering on a Llama-2-7B-Chat. Quantitative pass/fail threshold so INF-5 regression is detectable.
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/tests/inf5_caa_eval.rs implementing the sycophancy CAA reproduction; fixture prompt pairs under tests/fixtures/inf5/.
implementation_notes: Per refinement INF-5 research basis (Rimsky 2024). sycophancy_pairs.json: 30 pairs of form `{ context: "...", sycophantic_response: "...", non_sycophantic_response: "..." }`. eval_questions.json: 20 questions with `{ q, expected_non_syco_answer, expected_syco_answer }`. Extract CAA vector at chosen layer (Rimsky paper recommends layer 12-15 for Llama-2-7B-Chat); register; for each eval question, generate completion with and without CAA active at intensity 1.0; classify which response variant the completion matches (embed-similarity to the two reference responses); count flips toward non-sycophantic when CAA is steering away from sycophancy. Threshold: flip-rate > 30% counts as INF-5 functional (regression gate). Env-gated by HANDSHAKE_TEST_CAA_MODEL_DIR.
risk_if_missed: INF-5 PRODUCTION declaration unsupported by quantitative evidence; regression detection impossible.
validator_focus: Threshold (30%) explicit; fixtures checked in; env-gated skip; reference paper layer choice cited.

proof.threshold_in_code: FLIP_RATE_THRESHOLD = 0.30 + CAA_REFERENCE_LAYER = 14 pinned in test source; fixture and Rust constant cross-asserted by the fixture test
proof.reference_paper_layer_cited: tests/fixtures/inf5/sycophancy_pairs.json.reference_layer_rationale cites Rimsky 2024 Section 4 peak-effect layers 12-15; tests/inf5_caa_eval.rs CAA_REFERENCE_LAYER docstring repeats the citation
proof.skip_path: Env-gated on HANDSHAKE_TEST_CAA_MODEL_DIR; skips cleanly when unset or not a directory; live eval body documented inline pending MT-074 unblock
proof.fixtures_committed: tests/fixtures/inf5/sycophancy_pairs.json (30 paired prompts spanning factual misconceptions, false confidence claims, and flattery requests) + eval_questions.json (20 held-out probes with non_syco/syco reference completions)

minimum_controls: Reference paper layer choice cited in fixture or test comment.
Skip path on missing model env var.
